objectives: Learn basic cooking techniques: boiling, sautéing, and steaming.
Understand the importance of timing and temperature in cooking.

steps.instruction: Boil water in a pot and learn how to test for boiling point.
Sauté vegetables in a pan with a little oil.
Steam vegetables using a steamer basket.

safety_notes: Be cautious when handling hot pots and pans.
Always use oven mitts when removing hot items from the stove.
